This brief has been retired.

The earlier version of this page made a claim about the product that we tested against our own domain and could not substantiate. We have stopped selling the product that claim was built on, and we are rewriting the company around the measurement layer that does work.

If you received a link to this page and want the updated version, written honestly against what we can actually prove, the right next step is a short conversation.

Lance@hi.neverranked.com
